old.first_200: process_batch and process_incremental have redundant steps. stage() and commit() both copy data into the state, and freeze_view() rebuilds the view that stage() already built. Simplify the pipeline by
old.last_200:
stage, project
    st = make_state(entries)
    cleaned = normalize(st["raw"])
    merged = collapse(cleaned)
    stage(st, merged)
    # no commit — preview only
    return get_display_items(st)
